# Pull Request Template

Thank you for contributing to PedsCore! Please complete the following checklist to help us review your changes.

## Description

Provide a concise description of your changes and the motivation behind them. Explain any context necessary to understand the purpose of this pull request.

## Related issues

Link to any issues that this pull request addresses (e.g. fixes #123) or is related to. If there are none, you can leave this section empty.

## Changes made

- Itemise significant changes made in this PR (e.g. “Added QTc calculator”, “Updated documentation for Silverman score”).
- Mention any new files created or existing files removed.
- Summarise modifications to tests or build configurations.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self‑review of my code.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my changes are effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation as appropriate.
- [ ] I have cited relevant references in the documentation.
- [ ] I agree to abide by the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
